title: astragalus onobrychis
intro: Astragalus onobrychis, also known as milk vetch, is a perennial plant species native to Central Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as immunomodulatory and adaptogenic activities. The health benefits of Astragalus onobrychis include reducing fatigue and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular protective effects. Astragalus onobrychis can be prepared as a herbal supplement, often in the form of capsules or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a tea or decoction.
